data.title: International Battery Metals Secures Fourth Follow-On Investment From EV Metals VII, LLC, Adding USD $2.8 Million Under Existing LOI
data.description: International Battery Metals Ltd., a tech company specializing in modular direct lithium extraction systems, revealed a non-brokered private placement financing. This marks the fourth investment under a binding Letter of Intent from February 28, 2025, allowing for up to $15.0 million. The funding comes from EV Metals VII LLC.

data.title: Expert Pediatric Therapist Jocelyn Mitchelle of In-Sync Pediatric Therapy Center Shares Home Speech Development Tips in HelloNation
data.description: In Van Buren, Arkansas on April 16, 2026, Jocelyn Mitchelle from In-Sync Pediatric Therapy Center shared valuable insights on fostering early language development in young children at home. The feature in HelloNation outlined simple and effective techniques for parents to support speech growth.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Shows Its Strength; Nvidia, Palantir Make These Moves (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a notable increase following unexpected inflation data. Notably, Google stock reached an initial buying opportunity. The latest market report highlights the positive performance of the Nasdaq index, with noteworthy movements from companies such as Nvidia and Palantir. This coverage provides insights into the current trends in the stock market, showcasing the strength displayed by the Nasdaq.

data.title: The RealReal Announces Timing of Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: On April 16, 2026, The RealReal (Nasdaq: REAL), the leading online platform for authenticated resale of luxury items, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026, concluding on March 31. The information is scheduled to be unveiled after market hours on May 7, 2026.

data.title: Georgia Natural Gas® celebrates Earth Day and invites Atlanta to free electronics recycling event at Lenox Square
data.description: In celebration of Earth Day, the company commemorates 16 years of environmental leadership and achievement in offsetting nearly 1 billion pounds of carbon through their Greener Life® initiative. As Atlanta marks this milestone, residents and businesses across Georgia are encouraged to participate in promoting environmental stewardship by engaging in responsible recycling practices during Earth Week. The company's commitment to sustainability underscores their dedication to preserving the planet for future generations.

data.title: Seaport Entertainment Group Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Seaport Entertainment Group Inc. (NYSE: SEG) revealed plans to unveil its Q1 2026 operating and financial outcomes after market hours on May 6, 2026. The Company will conduct a conference call and audio webcast the following day, May 7, 2026 at 8:30 AM ET. For those interested in joining the live Telephone Conference Call, dial in at: Domestic: 1-800-717-1738 International: 1-646-307-1865.

data.title: AST SpaceMobile Announces BlueBird 7 Launch Date of Sunday, April 19, Invites Retail Investors to Attend Live Launch Event at Cape Canaveral
data.description: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. is set to launch BlueBird 7 on April 19 from the Kennedy Space Center Visitor Complex in Cape Canaveral, Florida. This company, traded on NASDAQ as ASTS, is pioneering a space-based cellular broadband network for smartphones. They aim to provide connectivity for commercial and government uses. Retail shareholders meeting requirements have the opportunity to join the live event. AST SpaceMobile is focused on developing innovative solutions for communication and aims to revolutionize mobile networks.

data.title: Signant Health Enters Definitive Agreement to Acquire Ametris
data.description: In Philadelphia on April 16, 2026, Signant Health revealed their plan to acquire Ametris, previously known as ActiGraph. Signant Health, a leading evidence generation company, aims to expand its reach by purchasing the global digital health solutions provider. The acquisition is pending approval through standard regulatory procedures. This strategic move signifies a significant development in the industry.

data.title: Hepsiburada to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 16, 2026, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, known as “Hepsiburada” and listed as HEPS on NASDAQ, a prominent e-commerce platform in Turkey, announced that it will release its unaudited financial statistics for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, post closure of the U.S. markets on Thursday, May 7, 2026.

data.title: Netflix Beats Q1 Earnings, Shares Slide On Soft Guidance, Co-Founder Exit
data.description: Netflix, a leading streaming service, released its first-quarter financial results for 2026, with revenue totaling $12.25 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $12.18 billion. Earnings per share stood at $1.23, exceeding the estimated 76 cents per share. The company observed a 16% year-over-year revenue increase, fueled by membership expansion, higher pricing, and augmented ad revenue. Stronger membership growth propelled revenue beyond expectations. Operating cash generated during the quarter reached $5.3 billion, showing a significant rise from the previous year's $2.8 billion. Free cash flow amounted to $5.1 billion. The market response has pushed Netflix stock into trending territory. Investors are advised to monitor NFLX closely for further developments.

data.title: Iowa American Water Parent Company Celebrates 140 Years of Providing Safe and Reliable Water and Wastewater Services to Customers and Communities in 2026
data.description: In Davenport, Iowa, on April 16, 2026, Iowa American Water, a branch of American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater service provider in the U.S., celebrates American Water's remarkable 140-year record of delivering secure, pure, dependable, and cost-effective water services.

data.title: CON EDISON DECLARES COMMON STOCK DIVIDEND
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) announced a quarterly dividend of 88.75 cents per share on its common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. Con Edison, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ED, operates as a holding company for various subsidiaries in the energy sector.

data.title: Cable One to Host Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Phoenix-based Cable One, Inc. (NYSE: CABO) has scheduled a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 5 p.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 results. The company will release the results after the market closes on the same day. To participate, individuals can access a live audio webcast on the Cable One Investor Relations website at ir.cableone.net or dial 1-833-461-5787 (International: 1-585-XXXXXXX).

data.title: Lincoln Electric Board Declares Dividend
data.description: A report from Cleveland revealed that Lincoln Electric Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: LECO) recently advised that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.79 per common share. The dividend is set to be disbursed on July 15, 2026, to shareholders as of June 30, 2026. Lincoln Electric is recognized as a prominent figure in high-performance industrial machinery and technology, aiding clients in the manufacturing and upkeep of essential equipment and infrastructure. Their cutting-edge solutions are designed to enhance overall quality.

data.title: ProPetro schedules Q1 2026 earnings call.
data.description: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, a significant increase from the previous month. This translates to approximately 10.4 million people currently without jobs. The government has expressed concern over this uptick and is considering measures to address the situation. Additionally, the inflation rate has also seen a slight increase to 2.3%, indicating a rise in overall prices of goods and services. Experts suggest that these economic indicators may lead to challenges for the country's economy in the coming months.

data.title: Americans have become more likely to say Trump is not too or not at all religious
data.description: A recent survey by the Pew Research Center reveals that 70% of Americans do not view President Donald Trump as very religious, an increase of 8 percentage points from a similar poll conducted in fall 2024. The findings also indicate a shifting perception among Republicans...
